app.title: UNMAPPED
app.subtitle: Nuna ƙwarewarku don samun damar aiki
onboarding.step1.title: Me kuke yi mafi yawan lokacin aikinku?
onboarding.step1.hint: Ku yi tunani game da ranar yau ta yau — menene ke ɗaukar yawancin lokacinku?
onboarding.step2.title: Mene ne mafi girman matakin ilimin ku?
onboarding.step2.hint: Haɗa da kowane makaranta na yau da kullun, ko da ba ku gama ba.
onboarding.step3.title: Kun taɓa koyar da kanku wata ƙwarewa?
onboarding.step3.hint: Koyo da kai yana ƙidaya — YouTube, gwaji, kallon wasu.
onboarding.step4.title: Shekara nawa kun kasance kuna aikin ku na farko?
onboarding.step4.hint: Kiyasin da ya yi kusa ya isa.
onboarding.step5.title: Menene mafi girman begen ku?
onboarding.step5.hint: Zaɓi abin da ke daidai da yanayin ku a yanzu.
results.title: Bayanan Ƙwarewarku
results.subtitle: Bisa amsoshinku, ga yadda ƙwarewarku ke da alaƙa da damar aiki.
results.ai_gauge.title: Shiryen AI
results.ai_gauge.description: Har zuwa ina aikinku ke fuskantar automatik a cikin shekaru goma masu zuwa.
results.tasks.title: Yadda Aikinku Yake
results.tasks.description: Ayyukan da suka saba da waɗanda ba su saba ba, na hannu da na tunani.
results.pathways.title: Inda Zaku Iya Ci Gaba
results.pathways.description: Sana'o'in da ƙwarewarku ta riga ta cancanta — ko kusa da hakan.
results.demand.title: Bukatar Ƙwarewarku
results.demand.description: Yadda ma'aikata a yankinku suke ɗaukar ma'aikata don abin da kuke sani.
policymaker.title: Allon Bayanan Kwararru na Ma'aikata
policymaker.subtitle: Giɓin ƙwarewa da shirye-shirye a duk yankuna da sassan aiki.
language.label: Harshe
